National Health Data Dictionary

(Frontend)

A Data dictionary for health facilities for standardization and compatibility reasons across national level. It registers different categories of data. User management, publication of data and version control through registration is its key feature.

OPENIMIS
(Customization)

OpenIMIS is an open source health insurance management system. It offers variety of features for customization, like registration, resource management, payment management and administration panel.

I have participated in customization of registration phase for Ethiopian context.

OPENIMIS (Customization)

OpenIMIS is an open source health insurance management system. It offers variety of features for customization, like registration, resource management, payment management based on users location.

I have participated in customization of registration phase for Ethiopian context.

Scrape Flow

Scrape flow is a web based online website scraping platform. It is based on third party libraries to get the content of web page. It also extends functionalities of other features of libraries like xyflow for interactive UIs, puppeteer for browser automation and so on.

Spotify Desktop Clone

This is a responsive Spotify desktop app clone built to replicate the core UI and UX of the original platform. It features a sleek, dark-themed interface with functional components such as a music library, playlists, artist views, and a playback control bar. The design includes interactive tabs, scrollable content, and dynamic rendering of music cards.

Live site

Github
